## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] Relevant automated tests

List exact commands, devices, OS versions, development-build details, and evidence.

## Risk and operations

- [ ] Permissions and denied/degraded states considered
- [ ] Privacy, logging, and data retention considered
- [ ] Migrations and RLS/storage policies tested where relevant
- [ ] Native rebuild/configuration changes documented
- [ ] Rollback or forward-fix path documented where relevant
- [ ] Setup, architecture, or ADR documentation updated where relevant
